marketing.faqLanguageAnswerSuffix: [ES] If your school needs a language we don't yet ship, contact support — we add languages based on customer demand.

trialCta.headline: [ES] Get structured dismissal up and running in a week.
trialCta.body: [ES] 30-day free trial. No credit card required. Built for schools running dismissal for 300 to 3,000 students.

faqs.metaDescription: [ES] Common questions about car line boards, trials, and security.
faqs.heading: [ES] FAQs
faqs.lede: [ES] Straight answers for admins and IT.

where.a: [ES] Each organization gets its own subdomain like yourslug.pickuproster.com. The main domain shows this marketing site; the board never mixes tenants. On Campus and District plans you can instead use a custom domain or a subdomain on your school's own domain (for example, pickup.yourschool.edu).

trial.a: [ES] Your trial ends on the later of 30 calendar days from signup or 25 qualifying pickup days. A qualifying day is a day with more than 10 distinct students marked as called.

viewer.q: [ES] How do families view the board?
viewer.a: [ES] Share the viewer PIN or a magic link. Viewer sessions are scoped to your organization and respect lockouts after failed attempts.

domain.q: [ES] Can we use our own domain?
domain.a: [ES] Yes — custom domains (or a subdomain on your school's own domain) are available on Campus and District plans. Point DNS to the same Worker as your other hosts. Car Line uses a yourslug.pickuproster.com subdomain.
